data.title: Introducing Agent Launchpad: SimCorp's Agentic AI ecosystem for investment managers
data.description: Launchpad. This platform allows clients to easily access and implement agentic AI within SimCorp One across various investment workflows. The initial partner, Orbit, a prominent investment research platform, will offer its financial intelligence agent through Agent Launchpad. This integration will provide users with improved access to advanced technologies, enhancing their investment strategies and decision-making processes.

data.title: Seeing is Believing: New Probes Reveal Proteins Inside Living Cells with Unprecedented Clarity
data.description: A new multicolor imaging technology created by the Albert Einstein College of Medicine and the Salk Institute for Biological Studies allows researchers to monitor proteins and cellular activity with high precision and minimal background interference. This innovative technology was developed in Bronx, New York, and was announced on April 22, 2026. The system enables tracking of various proteins and cellular processes with exceptional accuracy, exhibiting significant advancements in this field.

data.title: PolyAI launches Agent Development Kit to bring AI-native development to enterprise CX
data.description: PolyAI has introduced the Agent Development Kit (ADK) on April 22, 2026, in New York. This new tool empowers development teams by providing complete control in constructing and enhancing AI agents. With the ADK, teams can effectively build, deploy, and continuously improve their agentic AI. This initiative aims to revolutionize the approach towards AI development.

data.title: Guesty Launches ReplyAI Autopilot and AI Task Creation to Power Proactive Operations Inside the PMS
data.description: Guesty, a top property management system, has advanced from AI-supported responses to complete automation in operational tasks. On April 22, 2026, the company unveiled ReplyAI Autopilot and AI Task Creation features. This development marks a significant shift towards streamlined efficiency in property management.

data.title: Kia Presents Vision Meta Turismo at Milan Design Week, Redefining the Grand Tourer for the Digital Age
data.description: The Vision Meta Turismo concept by Kia showcases the brand's forward-looking vision for electric mobility in the future. It promises a dynamic and immersive driving experience that combines performance driving with digital interaction in a comfortable lounge-like setting. This concept exemplifies Kia's commitment to innovation and creativity in the field of electric vehicles.

data.title: New Oriental Announces Results for the Third Fiscal Quarter Ended February 28, 2026
data.description: On April 22, 2026, in Beijing, New Oriental Education & Technology Group Inc. (NYSE: EDU/ 9901.SEHK), a leading private educational services provider in China, revealed its unaudited financial performance for the third fiscal quarter ending in February.

data.title: Fortuna to release first quarter 2026 financial results on May 6, 2026; Conference call at 12 p.m. Eastern time on May 7, 2026
data.description: Fortuna Mining Corp., listed on NYSE as FSM and TSX as FVI, has disclosed that they are set to unveil their financial statements and Management's Discussion and Analysis (MD&A) for the initial quarter of 2026 on May 6, 2026, subsequent to the closure of the market. This announcement was made by the company in Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 22, 2026.

data.title: Hisense Celebrates Earth Day: The Quiet Green Shift Happening Inside Households Through Smarter Appliances
data.description: On April 22, 2026, in Dubai, UAE, a new refrigerator model was introduced that embodies a futuristic concept of intelligent decision-making. Unlike a typical science-fiction scenario, this 620-liter side-by-side refrigerator can autonomously determine the optimal time, such as 3 am, for certain functions.
